title: Starbound Music Pack
description: Starbound music fits perfect with Minecraft.
body:
# Music Resource Pack

For fans of Starbound music and everyone else.
This pack does not replace any existing music. It's just additional music. 

Music Rights owner and composer [Curtis Schweitzer](https://curtisschweitzer.com/).
Enjoy.

### Starbound music is copyrighted. Do not use it in commercial videos or for any commercial purpose.
